zucchini-plum-bread.name: Zucchini Plum Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line two loaf pans with parchment paper or coat with cooking spray.

Whisk zucchini, oil, 1 cup white sugar, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract together in a bowl until well mixed. Combine all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking soda, salt, 1 teaspoon cinnamon, and baking powder in a separate bowl; gradually stir into zucchini mixture until batter is just combined. Fold in plums. Pour batter into the prepared pans.
Combine 1 tablespoon white sugar and 1 teaspoon cinnamon together in a small bowl; sprinkle over batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, about 1 hour. Cool in the pans for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack until completely cooled.

zucchini-with-pork-recipe-comedera.name: Zucchini With Pork Recipe

ingredients.item: 12 onzas de lomo de puerco en trocitos
2 tazas de calabacitas  (cortadas en cubos medianos)

instructions: En una olla a fuego medio, cocina la carne de puerco con 1 taza de agua durante 10 minutos.
Kitchen with cover and reserve the cooking stock.
Agrega el aceite a la carne. Mezcla continuamente hasta dorar, aproximadamente 6 minutos.
Agrega la cebolla, el ajo, el chile serrano, las calabacitas y el elote. Mezcla y cocina durante 3-4 minutos.
Add the tomato purée and ½ cup of pork cooking water.
Lazona with oregano, cumin, salt and pepper.
Let them boil, cover the pot and let them cook at medium heat for 8 minutes or till the vegetables are as consistent as you like.
Serves hot and with anything you like.
